seo.title: Third Party Inspection Services
seo.description: RECPL provides statutory third party inspection of lifting tools, tackles, pressure vessels, and boilers under Factory Act 1948 Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A.

hero.title: TPI of Lifting Tools, Tackles & Pressure Vessels
hero.summary: Statutory inspection, testing, and certification by a Competent Person under the Factory Act 1948.
hero.description: RECPL inspects, tests, and certifies industrial equipment for statutory compliance, operational safety, and acceptance by State Factory Inspectorates and Boiler Inspectorates across India.

intro.description: Third Party Inspection (TPI) is a statutory requirement under the Factory Act 1948 to ensure that lifting equipment, pressure vessels, and other factory machinery are safe for operation. RECPL operates as a Competent Person under Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A of the Factory Act 1948, authorised to inspect, test, and certify the fitness of industrial equipment.

listGrid.title: Inspection Scope
listGrid.description: RECPL covers lifting tools and tackles, pressure vessels, boilers, and related accessories at prescribed statutory intervals.

items.title: Lifting Tools & Tackles
items: Jib cranes, gantry cranes, and monorail hoists
Chain pulley blocks and lever hoists
Wire ropes, slings, hooks, eye bolts, and shackles
Hydraulic and mechanical jacks, fork lifts, pallet trucks, clamps, grabs, and spreader bars

items.title: Pressure Vessels
items: Air receivers and compressed air tanks
Pressurised storage tanks and gas storage vessels

items.title: Boilers & Related Equipment
items: Boilers and associated equipment under Factory Act and IBR requirements
Load and pressure test readiness reviews
Inspection planning for periodic statutory examinations

steps.title: Pre-Inspection Planning
steps.description: Review equipment history, previous inspection reports, manufacturer specifications, and applicable codes and standards before site work begins.

steps.title: Visual Inspection
steps.description: Detailed examination for wear, corrosion, deformation, leaks, misuse, and mechanical damage.

steps.title: NDT Examination
steps.description: Non-destructive testing such as UT, MPI, and DPT is carried out wherever required to detect internal or surface defects.

steps.title: Functional Testing
steps.description: Load testing, hydrostatic or pneumatic pressure testing, and operational checks are performed as applicable to the equipment category.

steps.title: Documentation & Certification
steps.description: Issue detailed inspection reports, test certificates, and statutory fitness documentation such as Form 8, Form 10, or Form 14 where applicable.

steps.title: Recommendations
steps.description: Provide actionable recommendations for repairs, replacements, derating, or other controls if safe operation cannot be confirmed as-is.

standards.title: Compliance Framework for Inspection
standards.description: RECPL inspections are executed against the statutory and technical references applicable to the inspected asset.

items.description: Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A for inspection by a Competent Person.
Indian Boiler Regulations applicable to boilers and associated systems.
Code of practice relevant to lifting appliances and periodic examination.
Code of practice for unfired pressure vessels and safe operation checks.
Design, manufacture, erection, and testing references for cranes and hoists.
Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code references where industrial equipment requires it.
Personnel qualification and certification basis for NDT support used during inspection.

cta.title: Need statutory inspection and certification support?
cta.description: RECPL helps industry stay compliant with mandated inspection cycles for lifting tools, tackles, pressure vessels, and related factory equipment.
